expectations.text: A0: Output file exists with real content
expectations.evidence: workflow-order.md is 180 lines, contains detailed 10-step workflow from brainstorming through finishing-a-development-branch

expectations.text: A1: quality-scenarios is mentioned/included in the workflow
expectations.evidence: Step 4 is explicitly 'superflowers:quality-scenarios' with full description of what it does and produces

expectations.text: A2: quality-scenarios comes AFTER architecture-style-selection and BEFORE feature-design
A3: quality-scenarios.md is referenced as an artifact
expectations.evidence: Step 4 produces 'docs/superflowers/quality-scenarios.md'; summary table lists 'quality-scenarios.md (testable scenarios by type)'; spec writing step references quality-scenarios.md alongside architecture.md and .feature files

expectations.text: A4: Test-type categorization from quality-scenarios flows into output
expectations.evidence: Step 4 says 'Classifies each scenario into a test type: unit-test, integration-test, load-test, chaos-test, fitness-function, or manual-review'; Step 8 (writing-plans) says 'References quality-scenarios.md, categorizes test tasks by test type (unit first, then integration, then load/chaos)'; Step 9 mentions 'quality scenario tests' in completion verification
